meta.title: From HELIOS to SOL
meta.message: Helios (Greek) / Sol (Roman) is the god of the sun, driving a chariot across the sky each day to bring light to the world.

ladder.clue: Drop the fourth letter from <> and anagram to get some sights on a golf course
Change one letter in <> to get a basketball term
Change middle letter of <> and reverse to get an element
A musician likely doesn't have a <> {}
Insert a letter into <> to get a figure of speech
Change one letter in <> to become straightforward
If it's {} and <>, no other details are needed
